intro: Acorus calamus powder, also known as calamus powder, is derived from the dried root of the Acorus calamus plant, a perennial herb native to Asia and Europe. Traditionally used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine, calamus powder is valued for its potential anti-inflammatory and carminative properties, which can help alleviate digestive issues and soothe the nervous system. However, its use is not without controversy, as some studies suggest that calamus powder may contain toxic compounds that can cause adverse effects in high doses.
